name: 10L Int5-MLP + MuonWD=0.04 + SWA/50 + SmearGate + BigramHash
blurb: 10 layers with mixed int5/int6 quantization (int5 for MLP, int6 for attention). Int5 MLP compression saves 1.86MB vs uniform int6, funding the extra layer. Weight decay=0.04 improves quantization friendliness. SWA every 50 steps (~29 checkpoint average). SmearGate + BigramHash + OrthoInit + zstd-22.
